productDisplayName: Wildcraft Men Green Fleece Sleeveless Jacket
description: Style NoteKeep toasty warm with this fleece jacket from wildcraft. For the coolest outdoorsy style choose Wildcraft - specially designed for active types who care about the high performance of their gear (but don't worry, you won't miss out on style either - the brand have easily fused form and function in their products).Product DetailsElm green sleeveless jacket made of extremely soft, ultra light fleece which will wick away moisture and provide insulation, yoked back and shaped seams for Fit, full zip front fastening, mock neck and two insert pockets on sidesMaterials and Care100% polyesterMachine washDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
